SEARCH

Serialized Form

  • Package com.parsons.controller

    • Class com.parsons.controller.BaseParsonsView

      class BaseParsonsView extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • answerPanelRight
          JPanel answerPanelRight
          Right panel where the student drags code blocks to build their answer.
        • blocksPanelLeft
          JPanel blocksPanelLeft
          Left panel holding the shuffled code blocks available to the student.
        • centerPanel
          JPanel centerPanel
          Center panel holding topPanel, splitPane, and the subclass south panel.
        • problem
          ParsonsProblem problem
          The Parsons problem being displayed. Not final so EditorView can replace it after a file upload.
        • responseLabel
          JLabel responseLabel
          Label shown below the split pane to display correct/incorrect feedback.
        • topPanel
          JPanel topPanel
          Top panel inside centerPanel, holding title and instructions rows.

    • Class com.parsons.controller.HomeController

      class HomeController extends JFrame implements Serializable

    • Class com.parsons.controller.WelcomeView

      class WelcomeView extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • problems
          List<ParsonsProblem> problems
          The full list of problems loaded from the repository.
        • service
          ParsonsProblemsService service
          The service used to retrieve and persist Parsons problems.
        • tableModel
          DefaultTableModel tableModel
          The table model backing the problems JTable.

  • Package com.parsons.controller.setter

    • Class com.parsons.controller.setter.EditorView

      class EditorView extends BaseParsonsView implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • name
          String name
          Account name of the current user, used for refresh after save or delete.

    • Class com.parsons.controller.setter.SetterWelcomeView

      class SetterWelcomeView extends WelcomeView implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • name
          String name
          Stores the name passed to this.

      class SolverView extends BaseParsonsView implements Serializable

      class StudentWelcomeView extends WelcomeView implements Serializable
